word: H2933 - טָמָה - ṭâmâh - taw-maw' - Be defiled

sections.paragraph:
Original: טמה

Transliteration: ṭâmâh

Phonetic: taw-maw'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Niphal) to be stopped up
    1. to be regarded as unclean (metaplastic)

Origin: a collateral form of H2930

TWOT entry: 810

Part(s) of speech: Verb
